name: dissoc-single
note: Expands to IIFE: ((=> () (const (object (alias key _g0) (rest rest_g1)) obj) rest_g1)). Gensym counters may vary.
expansion_description: IIFE arrow function containing destructuring assignment that removes :key and spreads rest

name: dissoc-multiple
note: Expands to IIFE with multiple alias patterns to remove :a and :b
expansion_description: IIFE arrow function containing destructuring assignment that removes :a and :b and spreads rest
